checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 911 divs with only 11 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 67/196 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript

24 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 164/188 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~90,854 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 4% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 16 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~28,397 tokens (31% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.11–$1.36 per load ($0.57–$6.81 for a 5-page session)
104 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: contentinfo, main, navigation
All 189 images have alt attributes (189 descriptive, 0 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
12 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
1 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 83ms
Compact payload: 36KB
No redirects — direct access
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
